contributing_factors: Thermal stress indicators, Airflow degradation indicators
symptoms: high vibration, low airflow, high power consumption
recommendation: Priority maintenance inspection recommended. Sustained degradation patterns detected.
ai_summary: Bearing failure or impeller imbalance causing vibration, reduced airflow, and increased motor load.
ai_impact: Compromised process cooling, potential equipment damage, and significant energy waste.
ai_guidance: Immediately inspect fan bearings for wear and proper lubrication., Perform dynamic balancing of the fan impeller if imbalance is detected., Verify motor winding integrity and electrical connections for signs of overload.

contributing_factors: Mechanical instability indicators, Airflow degradation indicators
symptoms: high vibration, low airflow, high temperature
recommendation: Immediate inspection recommended. Potential compressor or thermal overload risk detected.
ai_summary: Refrigerant overcharge or fouled condenser coil causing compressor strain and high discharge temperatures.
ai_impact: Compromised process cooling, potential equipment damage, and unscheduled downtime impacting production schedules.
ai_guidance: Verify refrigerant charge and subcooling/superheat readings., Inspect and clean condenser coil for airflow obstruction., Monitor compressor discharge temperature and amperage draw.

recommendation: Priority maintenance inspection recommended. Sustained degradation patterns detected.
ai_summary: Bearing failure or impeller imbalance causing vibration and reduced airflow.
ai_impact: Compromised process cooling, potential equipment overheating, and production downtime.
ai_guidance: Immediately de-energize and inspect fan bearings for wear, lubrication, and proper seating., Perform dynamic balancing of the fan impeller if no bearing failure is evident., Verify motor alignment and check for electrical anomalies affecting rotational speed.
